SEARCH
Package view.utils

Klasse SideBorder

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.border.AbstractBorder
view.utils.SideBorder
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable, Border
public class SideBorder extends AbstractBorder
A custom border that paints vertical white lines on one or both sides of a Swing component.

The side(s) of the border are determined by a numeric configuration value:

  • 0 - left side only
  • 1 - right side only
  • 2 - both left and right sides

Seit:
2026
Autor:
Bastian Rentzsch
Siehe auch:
  • Serialisierte Form

    Creates a new SideBorder with the specified side configuration.

    Methode

    paintBorder(Component c, Graphics g, int x, int y, int width, int height)
    Paints the border for the given component.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden javax.swing.border.AbstractBorder

    getBaseline, getBaselineResizeBehavior, getBorderInsets, getBorderInsets, getInteriorRectangle, getInteriorRectangle, isBorderOpaque

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • SideBorder

      public SideBorder(int bordersides)
      Creates a new SideBorder with the specified side configuration.
      Parameter:
      bordersides - the border side configuration: 0 for left, 1 for right, 2 for both sides

  • Methodendetails

    • paintBorder

      public void paintBorder(Component c, Graphics g, int x, int y, int width, int height)
      Paints the border for the given component.
      Angegeben von:
      paintBorder in Schnittstelle Border
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      paintBorder in Klasse AbstractBorder
      Parameter:
      c - the component being painted
      g - the graphics context used for painting
      x - the x-coordinate of the border area
      y - the y-coordinate of the border area
      width - the width of the border area
      height - the height of the border area
